title: Patch Window Announcement
text:
## Patch Window Announcement

Please be advised: the {adjective} production system will be unavailable on {day of week} from {number} to {number} PM.

During this window, IT will {verb} the database, replace a {color} {object}, and whisper {silly word} at the firewall.

Users should save {plural noun}, close the {adjective} app, and avoid {verb ending in -ing} near the {place}.

Expected impact: {emotion}, one {sound}, and temporary inability to {verb}.

Questions may be directed to {person}, senior {job}.
